# SkyGuard AI

> AI-powered real-time airspace monitoring with ML threat detection, trajectory prediction, and agentic intelligence.

SkyGuard AI is an airspace intelligence platform that provides real-time flight tracking, ML-based anomaly detection, drone identification, and AI-powered threat analysis. Built with TypeScript, Vite, MapLibre GL JS, deck.gl, and a FastAPI backend with ML models.

## Key Features

- Real-time flight tracking with radar data from OpenSky Network
- ML-based anomaly detection for airspace threats (XGBoost + Isolation Forest)
- Drone and UAV identification
- AI-powered threat analysis and trajectory prediction
- Interactive map with multiple data layers (aviation, weather, day/night)
- DGCA Intelligence Agent with AI copilot

## Tech Stack

- **Frontend**: TypeScript, Vite, MapLibre GL JS, deck.gl, D3.js
- **Backend**: FastAPI (Python), ML models (scikit-learn, XGBoost)
- **AI**: Groq (Llama 3), agentic threat analysis
